name: Red Hood Guild
summary: Elusive independent guild operating in shadowed relation to trade, intrigue, and forbidden or covert work.
motive: Exploit the gaps created by rigid law, secret demand, and elite hypocrisy.
power_relations: Independent but entangled with houses, guilds, and magical resistance networks
visible_membership_base: Fixers, smugglers, discreet couriers, rumor brokers.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: The guild thrives on opacity; every exposed cell threatens the myth of reach that protects the whole network.
